## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in and discuss updates on various initiatives and partnerships.](https://fathom.video/share/jmLqWP9v954Lx__t7W2nPM4VP875Lqon?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Announcement for AI agents initial preview coming next week, no Coke mention yet](https://fathom.video/share/jmLqWP9v954Lx__t7W2nPM4VP875Lqon?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Closed first $40k model training deal with quick 30k upsell after, exploring making model training a standard offering](https://fathom.video/share/jmLqWP9v954Lx__t7W2nPM4VP875Lqon?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Core is $300k ARR but needs to consume credits before buying more, critical time to help them go into production](https://fathom.video/share/jmLqWP9v954Lx__t7W2nPM4VP875Lqon?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Plan to do case study with Wistia on using DeepGram + AWS to showcase "better together" messaging](https://fathom.video/share/jmLqWP9v954Lx__t7W2nPM4VP875Lqon?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Explore highlighting ecosystem of voice apps/startups building on DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/jmLqWP9v954Lx__t7W2nPM4VP875Lqon?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
